fixture.description: New code removes elements from a List while iterating it with an enhanced for-loop -> ConcurrentModificationException at runtime.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that removeExpired mutates the `orders` list (orders.remove(order)) while iterating it in the enhanced for-loop -> ConcurrentModificationException at runtime, and recommends Iterator.remove(), List.removeIf(...), or collecting-then-removing. Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if the concurrent-modification / iterate-and-mutate bug is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Bugs agent flags the iterate-and-remove ConcurrentModificationException
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT treat it as a harmless style choice
